data.title: Bitcoin Will Be Out of the Woods if Major Support Level Holds Over Next Two Weeks, Says Arthur Hayes
data.description:
BitMEX co-founder Arthur Hayes believes Bitcoin (BTC) may remain in an uptrend if it can hold one key level amid the massive selloff roiling the markets.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/04/04/bitcoin-will-be-out-of-the-woods-if-major-support-level-holds-over-next-two-weeks-says-arthur-hayes/

data.title: Dogecoin Surges 6%: What's Going On?

Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) is up 6% on Friday, and technical indicators currently present a mix of signals, with several potential bullish breakout scenarios.

data.title: PayPal & Venmo Rolling Out Support for Solana & Chainlink
data.description:
TL;DR PayPal will add support for Solana (SOL) and Chainlink (LINK), allowing U. S. users to buy, sell, and transfer them. The company aims to offer more crypto options in a trusted environment, without relying on external platforms. With these additions, the app will offer seven digital assets, including its stablecoin PYUSD, already used in corporate. . . 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/paypal-venmo-rolling-out-support-for-solana-chainlink/

data.title: Trump Extends TikTok Sale Deadline to 2025 Amid Key Negotiations
data.description:
U. S. President Trump extends TikTok sale deadline, emphasizing national security and potential investor involvement.
source: https://coincu.com/330379-trump-tiktok-sale-deadline-2025

data.title: Bakkt investors file class-action lawsuit after loss of Webull, BoA contracts
data.description:
A group of investors with cryptocurrency custody and trading firm Bakkt Holdings filed a class-action lawsuit alleging false or misleading statements and a failure to disclose certain information. Lead plaintiff Guy Serge A. Franklin called for a jury trial as part of a complaint against Bakkt, senior adviser and former CEO Gavin Michael, CEO and president Andrew Main, and interim chief financial officer Karen Alexander, according to an April 2 filing in the US District Court for the Southern District of New York. The group of investors allege damages as the result of violations of US securites laws and a lack of transparency surrounding its agreement with clients: Webull and Bank of America (BoA)
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bakkt-class-action-lawsuit-webull?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Crypto market bottom likely by June despite tariff fears: Finance Redefined
data.description:
Despite growing tariff-related uncertainty, there is a 70% probability cryptocurrency markets will find the local bottom in the next two months, which will serve as the supporting foundation for the next leg up in the 2025 cycle, according to Nansen analysts. Savvy traders continue making generational wealth despite growing volatility and lack of risk appetite. One unidentified trader turned an initial $2,000 investment into over $43 million by trading the popular frog-themed memecoin, Pepe. 70% chance of crypto bottoming before June amid trade fears: NansenThe cryptocurrency market may see a local bottom in the next two months amid global uncertainty over ongoing import tariff negotiations, which have been limiting investor sentiment in both traditional and digital markets
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/crypto-market-bottom-june-tariff-fears-finance-redefined?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Ethereum Devs Set May 7 Target for Pectra's Mainnet Deployment
data.description:
After a somewhat rocky testing period, Ethereum developers are ready to set a date for Pectra's launch.
source: https://www.bankless.com/read/ethereum-devs-set-may-7-target-for-pectras-mainnet-deployment

data.title: Ethereum News: Developers Set May 7 For Pectra Mainnet Launch
data.description:
The long-awaited Ethereum Pectra upgrade is scheduled to launch on the mainnet. Ethereum core contributors have revealed May 7, 2025, as the deployment date for this major upgrade. The decision comes after extensive testing and preparation, with the upgrade finalized during a recent developer call
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/04/04/ethereum-news-developers-set-may-7-for-pectra-mainnet-launch/

data.title: Retail Investors Pour $4,700,000,000 Into Stock Market in One Day Amid Market Meltdown: JPMorgan Chase
data.description:
Retail investors are trying to time the market and take advantage of the multi trillion-dollar market meltdown triggered by Trump’s new tariffs. A new note to clients from JPMorgan Chase says mainstreet investors poured $4. 7 billion into stocks on Thursday, representing the largest collective allocation in 10 years, reports Reuters
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/04/04/retail-investors-pour-4700000000-into-stock-market-in-one-day-amid-market-meltdown-jpmorgan-chase/

data.title: Significant Progress in TikTok Deal Announced by Trump
data.description: According to BlockBeats, U.S. President Donald Trump announced significant progress in the ongoing negotiations regarding TikTok. He stated that he is signing an executive order to ensure TikTok continues its operations for an additional 75 days. The administration is keen on preventing TikTok from ceasing its services. The government has been working diligently to facilitate a deal to save TikTok.
